core_payload.content:
# DeepMine Project

## 1. Role
DeepMine Project is the fuller quarry program of N1Hub, pushing mining beyond the first industrial layer toward richer provider diversity, stronger context assembly, smarter ore manifests, and better economic routing.

## 2. Project Contract
The project unifies API, subscription, and hosted inference lanes under one governed quarry; assembles context packs intentionally; preserves clearer ore manifests and extraction boundaries; and routes mining work by assignment class, background posture, and budget state.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Quarry output is easier for A2C, Workspace, and N-Infinity to consume because the mining program delivers cleaner ore, better economics, and more explicit handoff expectations.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
DeepMine Project supports To Dig Deep by making extraction a governed program rather than a bag of provider calls.

neuro_concentrate.summary: DeepMine Project defines the quarry program that gathers source material for N1Hub through governed provider diversity, stronger context-pack assembly, smarter ore manifests, and assignment-aware routing. It connects extraction quality to budget posture, background runtime, and downstream handoff into A2C, workspace, and swarm lanes. The capsule matters because mining must produce cleaner, more legible material rather than just more tokens. It frames DeepMine as a disciplined quarry prepared for trustworthy refinement instead of ad hoc model traffic.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so the project states its doctrine directly.
